summary: DHH announces that Basecamp has been added as a candidate for Fast Company's 2005 Fast 50 list. He encourages readers to rate them and support their small four-person team competing against larger companies. The post highlights the David vs. Goliath narrative that would become central to 37signals' brand identity.
key_points: Basecamp was nominated for Fast Company's 2005 Fast 50 list
The team was only four people at the time, emphasizing their small-and-proud ethos
DHH frames the competition as a small crew taking on 'the big guys'
money_quotes: give our 4-man crew a chance to compete against the big guys
key_insight: Even in its earliest days, 37signals embraced the identity of a tiny team punching above its weight against larger competitors.
